rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Ntc Of Continuation Of Hearing Mtn For Summary Adjuciation Of The 1st Cause Of Action
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, OCTOBER 11, 2007, LINE 6, PLAINTIFFS KEARNEY STREET LAW OFFICES, INC., RAUL AGUILAR, AGUILAR LAW OFFICES, A PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION'S Amended Notice Of Continuation Of Hearing Motion For Summary Adjudication Of The First Cause Of Action. rulings.Case Title: KEARNEY STREET LAW OFFICES, INC., A CALIFORNIA VS. JOHN ARTHUR SEBASTINELLI et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, OCTOBER 11, 2007, LINE 6, PLAINTIFF KEARNEY STREET LAW OFFICES, INC.'S AMENDED MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS OFF CALENDAR, NEW COUNSEL MUST EVALUATE WHETHER TO PURSUE THIS CLAIM AND IF COUNSEL DECIDES TO DO SO, THE MOTION MAY BE RENOTICED. =(302/PJM/AY)

rulings.Case Title: KEARNEY STREET LAW OFFICES, INC., A CALIFORNIA VS. JOHN ARTHUR SEBASTINELLI et al

TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT REGARDING THE AMOUNT OF DAMAGES BECAUSE SEBASTINELLI ALLEGEDLY HAS OFFSETTING CLAIMS AND IS ENTITLED TO DISCOVERY ON THOSE ISSUES UNDER CCP SECTION 437c(h). =(302/PJM/AY)

rulings.Case Title: CHARLES ANASTOS VS. BOB PECHOULTRES et al
